message: 🌱 Add harbor: Core logs error "failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt mission (#460)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "harbor-12261-core-logs-error-failed-to-verify-token-oidc-malformed-jwt-square-go",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "harbor: Core logs error \"failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt: square/go-jose: compact JWS format must have three parts\" after switch to S3 storage -- excessive warning messages.",
+    "description": "Core logs error \"failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt: square/go-jose: compact JWS format must have three parts\" after switch to S3 storage -- excessive warning messages.. Users encounter: \"for all requests to the core server:\".",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify harbor troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=harbor\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for error: `for all requests to the core server:`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Pod configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant harbor resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get pod -A\nkubectl describe pod <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n**Expected behavior and actual behavior:**\n\nOn a Harbor installation (Kubernetes using harbor-helm), I'm seeing the following error for all requests to the core server:\n\n```\n2020-06-16T11:32:11Z [WARN"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Core logs error \"failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt",
+        "description": "Solves log spam in this issue:\n\nhttps://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/12261\n```yaml\n2020-06-16T11:32:11Z [WARNING] [/server/middleware/security/idtoken.go:45][requestID=\"a4f074b4-2cd2-4976-a68c-5f378fbc4882\"]: failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt: square/go-jose: compact JWS format must have three parts\r\n2020/06/16 11:32:11.281 [D] [transaction.go:62]  |    10.217.5.96| 200 |    502.279µs|   match| GET      /api/v2.0/ping   r:/api/v2.0/ping\r\n2020-06-16T11:32:14Z [WARNING] [/server/middleware/security/idtoken.go:45][requestID=\"29e92515-252d-4218-b16c-7530880cb5a6\"]: failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt: square/go-jose: compact JWS format must have three parts\r\n20\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Core logs error \"failed to verify token: oidc: mal is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that `for all requests to the core server:` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: Solves log spam in this issue:\n\nhttps://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/12261. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2020-06-16T11:32:11Z [WARNING] [/server/middleware/security/idtoken.go:45][requestID=\"a4f074b4-2cd2-4976-a68c-5f378fbc4882\"]: failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt: square/go-jose: compact JWS format must have three parts\r\n2020/06/16 11:32:11.281 [D] [transaction.go:62]  |    10.217.5.96| 200 |    502.279µs|   match| GET      /api/v2.0/ping   r:/api/v2.0/ping\r\n2020-06-16T11:32:14Z [WARNING] [/server/middleware/security/idtoken.go:45][requestID=\"29e92515-252d-4218-b16c-7530880cb5a6\"]: failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt: square/go-jose: compact JWS format must have three parts\r\n2020/06/16 11:32:14.062 [D] [transaction.go:62]  |    10.217.5.96| 200 |    294.838µs|   match| GET      /api/v2.0/ping   r:/api/v2.0/ping",
+        "That would be my guess too, but Kubernets healthcheck-requests AFAIK shouldn't have to carry ID tokens...",
+        "2020/06/18 23:30:01.897 [D] [transaction.go:62]  |   10.161.40.88| 200 |    231.166µs|   match| GET      /api/v2.0/ping   r:/api/v2.0/ping\r\n2020-06-18T23:30:09Z [WARNING] [/server/middleware/security/idtoken.go:45][requestID=\"473dfbc4-0ce9-4db3-bde5-671479e41120\"]: failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt: square/go-jose: compact JWS format must have three parts\r\n2020/06/18 23:30:09.983 [D] [transaction.go:62]  |   10.161.40.88| 200 |    240.118µs|   match| GET      /api/v2.0/ping   r:/api/v2.0/ping\r\n2020-06-18T23:30:11Z [WARNING] [/server/middleware/security/idtoken.go:45][requestID=\"a6624c06-8ab2-4ec0-bb63-2055e1be0a2e\"]: failed to verify token: oidc: malformed jwt: square/go-jose: compact JWS format must have three parts\r\n2020/06/18 23:30:11.897 [D] [transaction.go:62]  |   10.161.40"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "harbor",
+      "community",
+      "container-registry",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "harbor"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Persistentvolumeclaim"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/12261",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/pull/13286"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 18,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with harbor installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-10T06:51:10.776Z",
